text.title: docker-security-hardening Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for docker-security-hardening as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Using ARG to pass secrets at build time: ARG API_KEY and then ENV API_KEY=$API_KEY.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Build args appear in docker history and in any exported image, even after the build completes. Anyone with pull access to the image can recover the secret.

failure-mode.description: Copying .env files into the image with COPY .env . without removing them in a later layer.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The .env file is embedded in the image layer regardless of later RUN rm commands — Docker layers are immutable and the file exists in the prior layer.
